Kyoto Day Trip Guide: Start the morning with a 6am visit to Fushimi Inari Taisha to walk the iconic torii gate path before the crowds arrive; the full hike to the summit takes about 2–3 hours. Take the JR Nara Line to Tofukuji, walk north through Gion to the Yasaka Shrine, and explore the preserved machiya townhouses on Ninenzaka and Sannenzaka lanes. Lunch at Nishiki Market offers excellent street food including fresh tofu, grilled skewers, and matcha soft-serve. End the day at Kinkakuji (Golden Pavilion) and Ryoanji rock garden before catching the Shinkansen back to Osaka or Tokyo.
